old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-x4oa","title":"[security] hand-rolled CBOR parser in coap_keys.c for key management","description":"The decode_key_put_cbor() implements custom CBOR parsing instead of zcbor (include was removed in f4918152b). Complex manual map/string parsing with many branches risks buffer overruns, incorrect key extraction, or bypass of TOFU/admin checks. Key handling (pubkeys for Schnorr/OSCORE/EDHOC) should use vetted decoder. See lines 761-940. Recommend replace with zcbor_decode or tinycbor.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"agent@lichen-project.dev","created_at":"2026-07-23T02:22:00.237285866Z","created_by":"AI Agent","updated_at":"2026-07-23T02:22:00.237285866Z"}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-x4oa","title":"[security] hand-rolled CBOR parser in coap_keys.c for key management","description":"The decode_key_put_cbor() implements custom CBOR parsing instead of zcbor (include was removed in f4918152b). Key handling (pubkeys for Schnorr/OSCORE/EDHOC) should use vetted decoder. See lines 761-940.
